nasb.text: When the Most High gave the nations their inheritance, When He separated the sons of man, He set the boundaries of the peoples According to the number of the sons of Israel.

esv.text: When the Most High gave to the nations their inheritance, when he divided mankind, he fixed the borders of the peoples according to the number of the sons of God.

cnv.text: 至高者把地業賜給列國的時候， 把人類分開的時候， 就照著以色列子孫的數目， 立定了萬民的境界。

ccb.text: 当初，至高者赐万国产业， 把人类分开， 祂依照天使的数目， 为万族定疆界。
